case_title: MA DEL CARMEN TAPIA VS. MARIA CENTENO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-20-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MA DEL CARMEN TAPIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA CENTENO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY TAPIA, MA DEL CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT CENTENO, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $40 (WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPIA, MA DEL CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT CENTENO, MARIA

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00<WAIVED>);REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPIA, MA DEL CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT CENTENO, MARIA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPIA, MA DEL CARMEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-07-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MA DEL CARMEN TAPIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA CENTENO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-25-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MA DEL CARMEN TAPIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA CENTENO IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MA DEL CARMEN TAPIA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA CENTENO IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
